title: glandularia ballsii
intro: Glandularia ballsii, also known as Ball's Verbena, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Glandularia ballsii can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
